headline: A Look At Moderna (MRNA) Valuation After Q1 2026 Earnings And New Vaccine Approvals
summary: Moderna (MRNA) is back in focus after its Q1 2026 earnings, reporting revenue of US$389 million compared with US$108 million a year earlier and a wider net loss of US$1.343 billion driven by litigation costs. See our latest analysis for Moderna. That backdrop of Q1 approvals, pipeline progress and a large litigation charge has come alongside a 1 day share price return of 1.24% decline, a 7 day share price return of 10.57% decline and a year to date share price return of 47.02%. headline: Moderna Inc (MRNA) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Growth Amidst Legal Challenges
summary: Moderna Inc (MRNA) reports significant revenue growth and strategic advancements despite a substantial net loss due to litigation settlements.
